title: Gr33n's Botanical Gardens
description: A Mod That Adds New Flowers, Plants, Foods,And More
body:
6 Colors of Petunias 

5 More colors Of Rose Bushes 

6 Single Roses To Go With all Colors of Rose bushes

Honeysuckles 

Hyacinths 

Tea leaves

3 Teas  Rose, Honeysuckle, And Regular

1 New Biome   Flower Forest all new flowers can be found here 

1 New enchantment Gaias Blessing Bone Meals The Ground As you walk 

 

I have plans to expand upon the food and am still working on decor

 

Keep in Mind This Mod Is Still Very much a work in progress

Check Out Kinetic For Server Hosting
